records.title: Airport Alpha operating environment
records.body: Airport Alpha contains passenger terminals, concessions, waste collection points, service roads, loading areas and back-of-house operations suitable for a controlled organic-waste pilot.

records.title: Mixed concession food waste creates avoidable hauling and carbon burdens
records.body: The airport concession system generates variable organic waste that is collected with limited source-level measurement, increasing hauling cost and preventing auditable carbon outcomes.

records.title: Modular organic-waste carbon conversion system
records.body: A modular system accepts separated food waste and converts it into a stable carbon-rich output while reducing material sent for disposal.

records.title: Distributed carbon measurement and chain-of-custody system
records.body: A sensing and data system measures waste mass, processing conditions, output quantity and custody events to support auditable carbon accounting.

records.title: Patent evidence for modular organic conversion
records.body: Patent record describing a modular reactor configuration, controlled residence time and recoverable carbon-rich output.

records.title: Campus organic-materials validation capability
records.body: A nearby campus laboratory can characterize feedstock, test output stability and validate operating parameters for an airport pilot.

records.title: Buyer demand for measurable waste and carbon outcomes
records.body: An airport services buyer seeks lower hauling cost, higher waste diversion and auditable carbon reporting without disrupting concession operations.

records.title: Climate demonstration pilot program
records.body: A demonstration program can support site validation, data collection and first-pilot deployment for emissions-reduction technologies.

records.title: Airport waste operations implementation capability
records.body: An implementation company can provide collection equipment, staff integration, maintenance and operational reporting for a pilot.

records.title: Carbon claims require measurable baseline, custody and durability
records.body: Any carbon claim must document a baseline, measured feedstock, conversion conditions, chain of custody, output durability and avoided double counting.
